turns.query: Help me analyze the multi-variate relationship between OSM geographical features, enterprise emissions, and air quality patterns at coastal Oilfield Employee Hospital station (station_id: 65) on 2025-07-03.
turns.actual_response:
2025年7月3日，冀东油田职工医院站点共获得21小时有效空气质量记录，日内污染水平总体较低，未出现PM2.5小时浓度超过75的情况。

关键结果如下：

- PM2.5日均值：17.10
- PM2.5小时峰值：39.00
- 平均AQI：34.05
- PM2.5超过75的小时数：0小时
- PM2.5峰值出现时段：23时

综合分析结论：

1. 空气质量总体处于较低污染水平  
   当日PM2.5均值为17.10，峰值为39.00，未发生PM2.5高值超标时段。AQI均值为34.05，说明该站点当日整体空气质量较好，细颗粒物污染压力不突出。

2. PM2.5具有明显晚间升高特征  
   分时段看，18—23时PM2.5均值升至35.00，明显高于白天各时段；峰值39.00也出现在23时。相比之下，00—05时、06—11时和12—17时PM2.5均值分别为6.25、10.67和12.00。说明当日颗粒物累积主要集中在晚间，呈现日内后段抬升特征。

3. PM2.5与PM10同步性较强，颗粒物来源可能具有共同影响  
   PM2.5与PM10的相关性较高，为0.79，表明细颗粒物与可吸入颗粒物在当日变化上较为一致。该结果提示颗粒物污染可能受到共同排放源、再悬浮、局地累积或区域输送等因素共同影响。

4. 与气态污染物的同步关系较弱  
   PM2.5与NO2相关性为0.09，与SO2为-0.36，与CO为-0.24，与O3为0.28。整体看，PM2.5与典型燃烧气态污染物之间未表现出稳定同步升高关系，说明当日PM2.5变化不能简单归因于单一气态污染物伴随排放。

5. 周边企业排放负荷较大，但与站点PM2.5小时变化的直接同步性有限  
   站点20公里范围内共有19家涉排企业。当日周边企业排放总量中，废气量约5.04亿立方米，NOx约2672.27千克，SO2约1832.56千克，颗粒物约823.53千克，CO约164387.47千克。  
   从空间结构看，10—20公里范围内钢铁类企业贡献最突出，尤其在废气量、NOx、SO2、颗粒物和CO方面占比较高。  
   小时尺度上，PM2.5与企业颗粒物排放的相关性仅为0.05，与企业NOx排放相关性为0.52。该结果表明，当日站点PM2.5并未与周边企业颗粒物小时排放呈现明显同步关系，但与NOx排放存在中等程度同向变化，可能反映燃烧源活动、二次转化条件或共同气象过程的影响。该关联不能直接解释为因果关系。

6. 周边地理功能结构以道路、居住、商业和交通设施为主  
   站点5公里范围内共有547个地理要素，其中道路171个、居住115个、商业86个、交通67个，是最主要的环境功能类型；工业类要素20个，水体20个。  
   距离分布上，0—1公里范围内129个，1—3公里范围内290个，3—5公里范围内128个，说明站点周边1—3公里范围内城市功能要素最为密集。道路、居住、商业和交通设施占比较高，提示局地交通活动、道路扬尘、生活源和城市混合活动可能对颗粒物背景波动具有一定影响。

7. 多变量关系判断  
   当日空气质量变化更接近“低污染背景下的晚间颗粒物累积”特征。周边企业排放总量较大，尤其远距离钢铁类企业排放负荷突出，但与站点PM2.5小时变化的直接同步性不强；站点周边近距离地理环境以道路、居住、商业和交通设施为主，可能对局地颗粒物波动提供持续背景贡献。  
   因此，当日PM2.5变化更可能是局地城市活动、颗粒物共同来源、晚间扩散条件变化及部分工业燃烧相关影响共同作用的结果，而不是由单一企业颗粒物排放直接主导。

监管建议：

- 对18—23时开展重点时段溯源分析，结合风场和边界层扩散条件进一步判断晚间颗粒物累积机制。
- 对站点周边道路、交通节点、商业活动区开展精细化扬尘和移动源管控评估。
- 对10—20公里范围内高排放钢铁类企业加强NOx、SO2、颗粒物协同排放核查，重点关注夜间生产负荷和污染治理设施运行稳定性。
- 建议将该站点作为沿海工业—城市混合影响监测点，持续开展“小时空气质量—企业排放—周边功能区—气象条件”的联合分析，以区分局地城市源、工业源和区域输送影响。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 基础空气质量统计、站点位置、周边企业排放与OSM地理要素的探索性聚合
start, end = "2025-07-03 00:00:00", "2025-07-04 00:00:00"
station_id = 65

# 1) 空气质量小时记录数量与核心统计；同时完成指定变量赋值
q_count = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id=:sid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
""")
n_air = int(pd.read_sql(q_count, engine, params={"sid": station_id, "start": start, "end": end}).iloc[0,0])

q_air_stats = text("""
WITH day_data AS (
  SELECT timestamp, aqi::float AS aqi, pm2_5::float AS pm2_5, pm10::float AS pm10, so2::float AS so2,
         no2::float AS no2, o3::float AS o3, co::float AS co
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality
  WHERE station_id=:sid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
),
peak AS (
  SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)::int AS peak_hour, pm2_5
  FROM day_data
  WHERE pm2_5 IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY pm2_5 DESC, timestamp ASC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS hours_observed,
       AVG(pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
       MAX(pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
       AVG(aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
       SUM(CASE WHEN pm2_5 > 75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceedance_hours,
       (SELECT peak_hour FROM peak)::int AS peak_pm25_hour_of_day,
       AVG(pm10)::float AS mean_pm10, MAX(pm10)::float AS max_pm10,
       AVG(so2)::float AS mean_so2, AVG(no2)::float AS mean_no2,
       AVG(o3)::float AS mean_o3, AVG(co)::float AS mean_co,
       corr(pm2_5, pm10)::float AS corr_pm25_pm10,
       corr(pm2_5, no2)::float AS corr_pm25_no2,
       corr(pm2_5, so2)::float AS corr_pm25_so2,
       corr(pm2_5, o3)::float AS corr_pm25_o3,
       corr(pm2_5, co)::float AS corr_pm25_co
FROM day_data
""")
air_stats = pd.read_sql(q_air_stats, engine, params={"sid": station_id, "start": start, "end": end}).iloc[0].to_dict()
mean_pm25 = float(air_stats["mean_pm25"]) if pd.notna(air_stats["mean_pm25"]) else None
max_pm25 = float(air_stats["max_pm25"]) if pd.notna(air_stats["max_pm25"]) else None
mean_aqi = float(air_stats["mean_aqi"]) if pd.notna(air_stats["mean_aqi"]) else None
exceedance_hours = int(air_stats["exceedance_hours"]) if pd.notna(air_stats["exceedance_hours"]) else None
peak_pm25_hour_of_day = int(air_stats["peak_pm25_hour_of_day"]) if pd.notna(air_stats["peak_pm25_hour_of_day"]) else None

# 2) 日内分段统计，用于识别空气质量时段型变化
q_period = text("""
SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN '00-05'
            WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 6 AND 11 THEN '06-11'
            WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 12 AND 17 THEN '12-17'
            ELSE '18-23' END AS period,
       COUNT(*) AS n,
       AVG(pm2_5)::float AS avg_pm25, MAX(pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
       AVG(aqi)::float AS avg_aqi, AVG(pm10)::float AS avg_pm10,
       AVG(no2)::float AS avg_no2, AVG(o3)::float AS avg_o3,
       SUM(CASE WHEN pm2_5 > 75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceed_hours
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id=:sid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
""")
period_stats = pd.read_sql(q_period, engine, params={"sid": station_id, "start": start, "end": end})

# 3) 站点位置与行政归属
q_station = text("""
SELECT s.name AS station_name, c.name AS city_name, d.name AS district_name,
       ST_X(s.coordinate::geometry)::float AS lon, ST_Y(s.coordinate::geometry)::float AS lat
FROM air_quality_station s
LEFT JOIN city c ON s.city_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN district d ON s.district_id=d.id
WHERE s.id=:sid
""")
station_info = pd.read_sql(q_station, engine, params={"sid": station_id}).iloc[0].to_dict()

# 4) 周边企业数量与当日排放聚合（按距离圈层与行业）
q_company_count = text("""
WITH st AS (SELECT coordinate FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=:sid)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS company_count_20km
FROM polluting_company pc, st
WHERE ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, st.coordinate, 20000)
""")
company_count_20km = int(pd.read_sql(q_company_count, engine, params={"sid": station_id}).iloc[0,0])

q_company_emis = text("""
WITH st AS (SELECT coordinate FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=:sid),
near_pc AS (
  SELECT pc.id, pc.industry_type,
         CASE WHEN ST_Distance(pc.coordinate, st.coordinate) <= 5000 THEN '0-5km'
              WHEN ST_Distance(pc.coordinate, st.coordinate) <= 10000 THEN '5-10km'
              ELSE '10-20km' END AS band
  FROM polluting_company pc, st
  WHERE ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, st.coordinate, 20000)
)
SELECT band, industry_type, COUNT(DISTINCT near_pc.id) AS companies,
       SUM(e.exhaust_gas)::float AS exhaust_gas,
       SUM(e.nox)::float AS nox, SUM(e.so2)::float AS so2, SUM(e.pm)::float AS pm,
       SUM(e.hc)::float AS hc, SUM(e.nmhc)::float AS nmhc, SUM(e.co)::float AS co, SUM(e.hcl)::float AS hcl
FROM near_pc
LEFT JOIN daily_polluting_company_emission e ON e.company_id=near_pc.id AND e.date='2025-07-03'
GROUP BY band, industry_type
ORDER BY band, industry_type
""")
company_emis = pd.read_sql(q_company_emis, engine, params={"sid": station_id})

# 5) 周边企业小时排放与站点空气质量的小时相关性（20km内）
q_hourly_emis_count = text("""
WITH st AS (SELECT coordinate FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=:sid),
near_pc AS (
  SELECT pc.id FROM polluting_company pc, st
  WHERE ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, st.coordinate, 20000)
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission e
JOIN near_pc ON e.company_id=near_pc.id
WHERE e.timestamp>=:start AND e.timestamp<:end
""")
hourly_emis_count = int(pd.read_sql(q_hourly_emis_count, engine, params={"sid": station_id, "start": start, "end": end}).iloc[0,0])

q_hourly_rel = text("""
WITH st AS (SELECT coordinate FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=:sid),
near_pc AS (
  SELECT pc.id FROM polluting_company pc, st
  WHERE ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, st.coordinate, 20000)
),
emis_h AS (
  SELECT timestamp, SUM(nox)::float AS nox, SUM(so2)::float AS so2, SUM(pm)::float AS pm,
         SUM(co)::float AS co, SUM(exhaust_gas)::float AS exhaust_gas
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission e
  JOIN near_pc ON e.company_id=near_pc.id
  WHERE e.timestamp>=:start AND e.timestamp<:end
  GROUP BY timestamp
),
air_h AS (
  SELECT timestamp, pm2_5::float AS pm25, pm10::float AS pm10, no2::float AS no2, so2::float AS so2, aqi::float AS aqi
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality
  WHERE station_id=:sid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS matched_hours,
       corr(air_h.pm25, emis_h.pm)::float AS corr_pm25_emis_pm,
       corr(air_h.pm25, emis_h.nox)::float AS corr_pm25_emis_nox,
       corr(air_h.pm25, emis_h.so2)::float AS corr_pm25_emis_so2,
       corr(air_h.pm25, emis_h.co)::float AS corr_pm25_emis_co,
       corr(air_h.aqi, emis_h.pm)::float AS corr_aqi_emis_pm
FROM air_h JOIN emis_h USING(timestamp)
""")
hourly_rel = pd.read_sql(q_hourly_rel, engine, params={"sid": station_id, "start": start, "end": end}).iloc[0].to_dict()

# 6) 大表OSM：先计数，再做聚合；按5km统计类型构成，并按1/3/5km统计总量圈层
q_osm_count = text("""
WITH st AS (SELECT coordinate::geometry AS geom FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=:sid)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS osm_count_5km
FROM osm_feature o, st
WHERE ST_DWithin(o.geometry::geography, st.geom::geography, 5000)
""")
osm_count_5km = int(pd.read_sql(q_osm_count, engine, params={"sid": station_id}).iloc[0,0])

q_osm_type = text("""
WITH st AS (SELECT coordinate::geometry AS geom FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=:sid)
SELECT main_type::text AS feature_type, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM osm_feature o, st
WHERE ST_DWithin(o.geometry::geography, st.geom::geography, 5000)
GROUP BY main_type
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 10
""")
osm_type_top = pd.read_sql(q_osm_type, engine, params={"sid": station_id})

q_osm_bands = text("""
WITH st AS (SELECT coordinate::geometry AS geom FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=:sid)
SELECT CASE WHEN ST_Distance(o.geometry::geography, st.geom::geography) <= 1000 THEN '0-1km'
            WHEN ST_Distance(o.geometry::geography, st.geom::geography) <= 3000 THEN '1-3km'
            ELSE '3-5km' END AS band,
       COUNT(*) AS n
FROM osm_feature o, st
WHERE ST_DWithin(o.geometry::geography, st.geom::geography, 5000)
GROUP BY band
ORDER BY band
""")
osm_bands = pd.read_sql(q_osm_bands, engine, params={"sid": station_id})

print("空气质量记录数:", n_air)
print("指定变量:", {"mean_pm25": mean_pm25, "max_pm25": max_pm25, "mean_aqi": mean_aqi, "exceedance_hours": exceedance_hours, "peak_pm25_hour_of_day": peak_pm25_hour_of_day})
print("空气质量统计与相关性:", air_stats)
print("分时段空气质量统计:", period_stats.to_dict("records"))
print("站点概况:", station_info)
print("20km内企业数量:", company_count_20km)
print("企业日排放聚合行数:", len(company_emis), "排放总量:", company_emis[["exhaust_gas","nox","so2","pm","hc","nmhc","co","hcl"]].sum(numeric_only=True).to_dict())
print("企业排放按圈层行业聚合样例:", company_emis.head(10).to_dict("records"))
print("企业小时排放记录数:", hourly_emis_count)
print("小时排放-空气质量相关性:", hourly_rel)
print("5km内OSM要素数量:", osm_count_5km)
print("OSM类型前10:", osm_type_top.to_dict("records"))
print("OSM圈层分布:", osm_bands.to_dict("records"))
